an2.240-244:1.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these two blameworthy qualities. What two? (240) Anger and hostility … (241) Denigration and insolence … (242) Envy and miserliness … (243) Deceitfulness and craftiness … (244) Moral shamelessness and moral recklessness. These are the two blameworthy qualities."
